commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Odaia, perhaps the same with Judaia, (Calmet) as the Septuagint read.
Who was. Hebrew and Septuagint, "Machatha "(Haydock) a place to the north of Basan, far from the limits of Juda, whence we should, perhaps, read Menu chat, as chap. ii. 52, 54.
